title: Optimised PVP Textures
description: This resource pack enhances Minecraft PvP by adding cleaner, more optimized and visually improved PvP textures.
body: This resource pack enhances Minecraft PvP by introducing cleaner, sharper, and more optimized textures designed for competitive gameplay. Weapons, tools, armor, and GUI elements have been refined to improve visibility, reduce visual noise, and help players react faster in intense combat situations. Perfect for players who want a smoother and more focused PvP experience without altering the core style of the game.
